semantic.role: Rule template registry providing predefined architectural constraint definitions for the ArchSpine project.
responsibilities: Define hardcoded rule templates (e.g., 'no-core-to-cli') with filenames and YAML content.
Expose a list of all available rule templates as RuleTemplateEntry objects.
Add a specified rule template to a project directory by writing the template file to a predefined path.
Retrieve metadata (severity, title, summary) from a rule template's content by parsing its header lines.
outOfScope: Enforcing or evaluating rules at runtime.
Loading external or user-defined rule templates beyond the hardcoded set.
Validating the structure or correctness of added template files.
Managing rule template versions or dependencies.
invariants: All template names must be keys in the internal RULE_TEMPLATES record.
Adding a template always writes the template file to rootDir/<derived-subdirectory>/<filename> based on template content.
The getRuleTemplateInfo function assumes the template content follows a specific Markdown header format: first line '# title', second line '# summary', etc.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a centralized, reusable mechanism for defining and distributing architectural rule templates across ArchSpine projects to enforce consistent dependency boundaries.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No evidence of recent changes to this file; the git intent message 'd63e898 1' does not map to observable code modifications.

publicSurface.description: Returns an array of all available rule template entries, each containing the template name, filename, and parsed title. Used by consumers that need to enumerate or display rule options.

Adds a predefined rule template by name to the specified project root directory, writing the template file to the correct subpath. Used by scaffolding or configuration commands to populate rule definitions.
Parses and returns metadata (severity, title, summary) from a given rule template's content. Used by UI or CLI to display rule properties without loading external files.
Interface defining the shape of a rule template entry: name, filename, and title. Used as the return type of listRuleTemplates and as a data contract for consumers.
